steps.t: Spears, swords, shields, and armour can be collected from yards throughout Stoke. Captain Grimmar asked you to collect spears, shields, swords, and ar…
The armoury stockpile is outside the Mead Hall of Stoke. Grimmar told you to bring the arms and armour to the armoury stockpile.
There are places to post the conscription notices throughout Stoke. Grimmar wants you to post the conscription notices he gave you.
Huthric is outside the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should speak with Huthric and let him know that you have done as Captain Grimmar has asked.
Grimmar is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should return to Grimmar and tell him that you have done all he asked.
